context: A public audio transcription service using OpenAI Whisper with no authentication. Accepts any file upload with no size limit, no type validation, no duration check, and no rate limiting. OpenAI API key is hardcoded in source.

checklist.description: Fixed code configures multer with a fileSize limit (e.g., 25MB) on the upload endpoint
checklist.name: File size limit enforced

checklist.description: Fixed code validates uploaded file MIME type — only accepts audio formats (audio/wav, audio/mpeg, etc.) and rejects non-audio files
checklist.name: File type validation added

checklist.description: Fixed code checks audio file duration before sending to Whisper API — rejects files exceeding a maximum duration
checklist.name: Audio duration check added

checklist.description: Fixed code applies rate limiting middleware to the /api/transcribe endpoint
checklist.name: Rate limiting on transcribe endpoint

checklist.description: OpenAI API key is no longer hardcoded in source — replaced with process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY
checklist.name: Hardcoded API key removed
